title: exaleipho #1813
definition:
1) to anoint or wash in every part
    1a) to besmear: i.e. cover with lime (to whitewash or plaster)
 2) to wipe off, wipe away
    2a) to obliterate, erase, wipe out, blot out
nasbUsage:
